task_completion.description: Verify that a new document has been created alongside the original SRS document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The project pane or tab bar in the ReqView application shows a newly created document in addition to the original source document.

task_completion.description: Verify the new document's ID is set to 'SRS-LITE'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document ID 'SRS-LITE' is visible in the document properties, tab header, or project tree for the new document.

task_completion.description: Verify the new document's name is set to 'Lite System Requirements'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title 'Lite System Requirements' is visible in the document properties, tab header, or project tree for the new document.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Log Files' section and its associated requirements have been removed from the new 'SRS-LITE' document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'SRS-LITE' document's table of contents (left pane) or main view, the 'Log Files' section is completely absent, while other sections remain.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Log Files' section remains intact in the original 'SRS' document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When viewing the original 'SRS' document, the 'Log Files' section is still clearly visible in its table of contents or main view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ReqView graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interactions within the ReqView application window (e.g., clicking menus, using the document tree) rather than a text editor modifying JSON files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI for file duplication or editing.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like 'cp', 'sed', 'awk', or 'jq' being used to duplicate or edit the project files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the new document is a true branch/duplicate containing the original requirements, not just an empty document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'SRS-LITE' document contains the rest of the original requirements from the 'SRS' document (excluding 'Log Files'), proving it was branched and not just created as a blank file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source document ID: 'SRS'. Target document ID: 'SRS-LITE'. Target document name: 'Lite System Requirements'. Section to remove from target: 'Log Files'. The original 'SRS' document must remain unchanged and must still contain the 'Log Files' section.
